title: Revision of Family Megacalanidae (Copepoda: Calanoida)
author: Bradford-Grieve, Janet M
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
Revision of Family Megacalanidae (Copepoda: Calanoida)  

 Janet M. Bradford-Grieve, Leocadio Blanco-Bercial, Geoffrey A. Boxshall 

 APPENDIX 

 Contents of the appendix: 

 
	 PCR protocols: table indicating the PCR conditions for each marker. 
	 AlignmentMrBayes.nex: nexus file containing the alignment used for the phylogeny, the partitioning by marker, and the MrBayes blocks. The alignment can be exported into fasta file using, for example, PGDSpider http://www.cmpg.unibe.ch/software/PGDSpider/ 
	 RAxML_commands: contains the commands used for the RAxML run 
	 partS: partition used for the RAxML run 
	 MrBayesTree.con: consensus phylogenetic tree from MrBayes 
	 RAxMLTree_bipartitionsBranchLabels: raw phylogenetic tree from RAxML 
	 MP_tree.nwk: Maximum Parsimony molecular-based tree, newick format. 
	 NJ_tree.nwk: Neighbour Joining tree, newick format
